nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1993; const int b = 2022; const int c = 2051; const int d = 2080; const int e = 2109; const int f = 2138; const int g = 2167; const int h = 2196; const int i = 2226; const int j = 2255; const int k = 2284; const int l = 2313; const int m = 2342; const int n = 2371; const int o = 2400;
